card_description: Ma'at is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 5 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick explores the "Lived Myth" (Joseph Campbell) and "Ma'at" (Right Order) as keys to his 1974 experience."
